ERROR.404_MESSAGE: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
ERROR.401_MESSAGE: You need to be logged in to access this page.
ERROR.403_MESSAGE: You do not have permission to access this page.
ERROR.500_MESSAGE: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

LOGIN.NAME: Name
LOGIN.RECOVER_MESSAGE: Enter your email to receive recovery instructions.
LOGIN.RECOVER_SUCCESS: A recovery email has been sent!
LOGIN.ERROR_NAME_MIN: Name must be at least 3 characters
LOGIN.ERROR_PASSWORD_MIN: Password must be at least 6 characters

TWO_FACTOR.TITLE: Two-Factor Authentication
TWO_FACTOR.MESSAGE: Enter the code sent to your device.
TWO_FACTOR.METHOD_MESSAGE: Choose how you want to receive the verification code.

RESET_PASSWORD.TITLE: Reset Password
RESET_PASSWORD.MESSAGE: Enter a new password to continue.
RESET_PASSWORD.PASSWORD_RULES: Password must include uppercase and lowercase letters, a number, and a special character.
RESET_PASSWORD.ERROR_PASSWORD_MIN_LENGTH: Password must be at least 6 characters long
RESET_PASSWORD.ERROR_PASSWORD_UPPERCASE: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
RESET_PASSWORD.ERROR_PASSWORD_LOWERCASE: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
RESET_PASSWORD.ERROR_PASSWORD_NUMBER: Password must contain at least one number
RESET_PASSWORD.ERROR_PASSWORD_SPECIAL: Password must contain at least one special character
